front: What are the mechanisms of checkpoint inhibitor immunotherapy?
back: Checkpoint inhibitors block inhibitory receptors: anti-PD-1 (pembrolizumab), anti-PD-L1 (atezolizumab), anti-CTLA-4 (ipilimumab). Reinvigorate exhausted T cells in tumors. Biomarkers: PD-L1 expression, TMB, MSI-H. Immune-related adverse events are common.
